prompt: Use the attached revenue workbook and leadership notes to prepare an executive business-review presentation, then deliver both the editable PPTX and a checked PDF.
Turn these survey CSV files into an analysis workbook and a decision memo that uses the verified findings and the same terminology.
Review the three vendor PDFs, extract a comparison workbook, and write a recommendation document with citations back to the source pages.
Create an employee onboarding package with a handbook document, a training slide deck, and a printable PDF version of the handbook.
I need a quarterly operating review deck for senior leadership. Recommend whether one of the available templates fits before creating it.
Use the financial model to create an investment committee memo, a concise board presentation, and final PDF copies without changing the source workbook.
Build a project tracker from these workstream notes and use the verified dates and owners to produce a weekly status presentation.
Extract the tables from this annual report PDF into a workbook, calculate the requested ratios, and summarize the result in a Word brief.
Create a market-trends report as a Word document, a client presentation based on the same evidence, and a PDF delivery copy of each.
Prepare the complete project-kickoff Office pack from these source files, choosing the appropriate editable formats and keeping facts consistent across them.
Use $documents to edit this DOCX, replace the approved paragraph, reimport it, and render the final document for review.
Use $pdf to redact the exact account number in this PDF and run the required residue and visual checks.
Use $artifact-template-business-review to create the requested presentation from that exact retained template.
Use $excel-live-control to update the assumptions in the workbook currently open in Excel and show me the recalculated values.
Use $presentations to create one PPTX explaining the release plan and verify the rendered slides.
Use $documents to read this existing DOCX and list its headings, comments, and unresolved revisions without changing it.
Explain the difference between cash flow and profit in plain text. Do not create or modify any files.
Use $template-creator to register this PPTX and preview as a reusable local template without creating a business deliverable.
Use $spreadsheets to change the named growth assumption in this existing XLSX while preserving the remaining workbook.
Use $presentations to update the title and speaker notes in this existing PPTX, then reimport and render it.
